title: Sweet Steamed German Fruit Pudding
description: A traditional German dessert featuring a winey and glassy-jelly texture, made with cream of tartar and steamed to perfection in a copper mug.

ingredients.name: Mixed berries
ingredients.notes: such as raspberries, blueberries, and blackberries

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour and cream of tartar.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed berries, granulated sugar, and red wine, and let it sit for about 15 minutes, until the berries start to release their juice.
Add the flour mixture to the berry mixture and stir until just combined.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and melted butter, then add the vanilla extract and whisk until smooth.
Add the egg mixture to the berry mixture and stir until just combined.
Pour the mixture into a copper mug or a heatproof bowl that fits into a steamer basket.
Place the copper mug or bowl into a steamer basket, and steam over boiling water for about 20 minutes, until the pudding is set and glassy.
Remove the pudding from the steamer and let it cool to room temperature.
Serve the pudding chilled, garnished with additional mixed berries if desired.
